nasb.text: Again Isaiah says, “There shall come the root of Jesse, And He who arises to rule over the Gentiles, In Him shall the Gentiles hope.”

esv.text: And again Isaiah says, “The root of Jesse will come, even he who arises to rule the Gentiles; in him will the Gentiles hope.”

cnv.text: 以賽亞也說： “將來必有耶西的根， 就是那興起來治理列邦的； 列邦都寄望於他。”

ccb.text: 以赛亚先知也说： “将来耶西的根要兴起， 祂要统治外族， 外族人都要仰望祂。”

csbs.text: 又有以赛亚说： “将有耶西的根， 就是兴起来统治外邦人的那一位； 外邦人要仰望他。”
